checkin.journal:
In general feeling good, kinda weird I had 3 bowel movements today. 

feeling a bit tired frobably Fixofenadin fault but the good news is I am sleepy in the evening so aim to fall asleep at 10. 9am is new 10am haha.
Bit worried about Toxaprevent - it cointains Magnezium Carobate 180 Mg and calcium carbonare on top of Manc (pulverised) + pills to swallow - also need to drink 0.6 l of liquid before bad might not be the best idea. I just hope it will let me sleep.
- no changes all ok
